callGraph.callee:
q
				.from({ sidebarProjects: collections.v2SidebarProjects })
				.innerJoin(
					{ projects: collections.v2Projects },
					({ sidebarProjects, projects }) =>
						eq(sidebarProjects.projectId, projects.id),
				)
				.leftJoin(
					{ repos: collections.githubRepositories },
					({ projects, repos }) => eq(projects.githubRepositoryId, repos.id),
				)
				.orderBy(({ sidebarProjects }) => sidebarProjects.tabOrder, "asc")
				.select

q
				.from({ sidebarProjects: collections.v2SidebarProjects })
				.innerJoin(
					{ projects: collections.v2Projects },
					({ sidebarProjects, projects }) =>
						eq(sidebarProjects.projectId, projects.id),
				)
				.leftJoin(
					{ repos: collections.githubRepositories },
					({ projects, repos }) => eq(projects.githubRepositoryId, repos.id),
				)
				.orderBy

q
				.from({ sidebarProjects: collections.v2SidebarProjects })
				.innerJoin(
					{ projects: collections.v2Projects },
					({ sidebarProjects, projects }) =>
						eq(sidebarProjects.projectId, projects.id),
				)
				.leftJoin

functions.name: resolveWorkspaceRemovalNavigationTarget
params:
{
	activeWorkspaceId,
	removedWorkspaceId,
	orderedWorkspaceIds,
	isWorkspaceValid = () => true,
	isWorkspaceDeleting = () => false,
}

callGraph.callee:
q
				.from({ tasks: collections.tasks })
				.innerJoin({ status: collections.taskStatuses }, ({ tasks, status }) =>
					eq(tasks.statusId, status.id),
				)
				.select
new Date(run.createdAt as unknown as string).getTime

q
				.from({ projects: collections.v2Projects })

					eq(projects.organizationId, activeOrganizationId ?? ""),

				.select

q
				.from({ projects: collections.v2Projects })
				.where(({ projects }) =>
					eq(projects.organizationId, activeOrganizationId),
				)
				.select

q
				.from({ projects: collections.v2Projects })

					eq(projects.organizationId, activeOrganizationId),
				)
				.select

electronTrpcClient.external.openFileInEditor
